title: Jujuba.
content:
Here's Uncle Jujuba,
        Who has a sweet tooth;
    He used to eat sugar-
        Cane oft in his youth,

    In South Carolina,
        Where sugar-cane grows,
    From which they make sugar,
        As everyone knows.
meaning:
Richard Hunter's contribution to classic is further solidified by the brilliance found in "Jujuba."...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
